LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER U.S. SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S SECOND AMENDED PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED ON JULY 22, 2014. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED. (302)
FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR APPROVAL IF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS FILED BY PETITIONER U.S. SETTLEMENT  FUNDING, LLC AS TO RESPONDENT ETCHEVERRIA, BERNARD
ORDER CONTINUING THE HEARING ON THE FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER U.S. SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (INS. CODE 10136(B).) THE "DISCLOSURE STATEMENT TEXAS" ATTACHED TO THE PETITION DOES NOT COMPLY WITH THE REQUIREMENTS OF INS. CODE 10136(B). (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR5976 (302)
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PETITIONER U.S. SETTLEMENT  FUNDING, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT CONTINUED THE HEARING ON PETITIONER U.S. SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS TO JUNE 9, 2014 AT 9:30 AM. THE COURT ADVISED MR. ETCHEVERRIA THAT THIS ARRANGEMENT IS NOT ADVANTAGEOUS FOR HIM AND THAT HE SHOULD MEET AND CONFER WITH PETITIONER TO DISCUSS IF HE CAN GET MORE FUNDS. COURT TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER U.S. SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC NTC OF HEARING ON FIRST AMENDED PETITION FOR APPROVAL OF TRANSFER OF STRUCTURED SETTLEMENT PAYMENT RIGHTS IS DENIED, WITHOUT PREJUDICE. IN THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED MAY 15, 2014, PETITIONER EMPHASIZES THAT THE SUBJECT ANNUITY PAYMENTS ARE LIFE CONTINGENT. (PROPOSED ORDER, P. 4:30 - 5:3.) HOWEVER, IN THE FIRST AMENDED PETITION, PETITIONER DID NOT PROFFER AS EVIDENCE THE ANNUITY POLICY OR ANY OTHER EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF THE DEFINITION OF "LIFE CONTINGENT" AS USED IN THE POLICY. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Second Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Jul-24-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. PETITIONER U.S. SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S Second Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is off calendar. A Dismissal Of Entire Action of All Parties and All Causes of Action was filed on July 22, 2014. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Ntc Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Jun-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Z. Shafai, Esq., 310.788.2889, for petitioner US Settlement Funding, LLC.
Bernard Etcheverria, 415.500.5601, defendant in propria persona.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PETITIONER U.S. SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC Ntc Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is denied, without prejudice. In the proposed order submitted May 15, 2014, Petitioner emphasizes that the subject annuity payments are life contingent. (Proposed Order, p. 4:30 - 5:3.) However, in the First Amended Petition, Petitioner did not proffer as evidence the annuity policy or any other evidence in support of the definition of "life contingent" as used in the policy. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Ntc Of Hearing On First Amended Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar May-08-2014 Continued To Jun-09-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John A. Shafai, Esq. of the Law Offices of John A. Shafai, Tel. 310.788.2889, by Court Call;
Bernard Etcheverria, Tel. 415.500.5601, payee, appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: The matter was discussed. After hearing, the Court continued the hearing on PETITIONER U.S. SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC's Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights to June 9, 2014 at 9:30 am. The Court advised Mr. Etcheverria that this arrangement is not advantageous for him and that he should meet and confer with petitioner to discuss if he can get more funds. Court to prepare order. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JOHN SHAFAI, ESQ., 310.788.2889, FOR PETITIONER U.S. SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC; No other appearances.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling with modification: PETITIONER U.S. SETTLEMENT FUNDING, LLC'S Petition For Approval Of Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights is denied without prejudice. (Ins. Code 10136(b).) The "Disclosure Statement Texas" attached to the petition does not comply with the requirements of Ins. Code 10136(b). (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR5976
